calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2026 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2025 Continued To Feb-24-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-09-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:40am and concluding at 9:48am.

Plaintiff Poonam, Inc. appearing represented by richard Michael Lieberman, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Paul Sevillano not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff PETER PATEL an officer of the company and the custodian of records and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Poonam, Inc., and against Defendant Paul Sevillano, as follows:

Damages: $34,000.00
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $645.00
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $34,645.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-03-2025 Continued To Jan-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 -

Plaintiff Poonam Inc. was present represented by Richard Michael Lieberman via zoom.
Defendant Paul Sevillano not appearing.

This matter is continued to January 9, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 as there were no courtesy copies submitted on this matter to department 505.
